summary: Full regression + new feature test for Archive section, LOESCHEN-confirmation delete, Dashboard moved into Lage, and read-only mode for archived incidents. Backend regression: 139/144 pytest green (only 5 pre-existing Meta version asserts failing, same as prior baseline). Frontend: all new flows verified (archive page, delete modal, role-based permissions, Lage dashboard with 8 KPIs + 4 SectionCards, AbschlussPage tab changes for active vs archived, sidebar operative-lock).

minor.issue: Returns version '1.0.0' while 5 test_step*_api.py tests assert old step versions (0.2.0/0.3.0/0.4.0/0.5.0/0.6.0). Pre-existing issue, unrelated to this change; tests should be updated to expect 1.0.0.

minor_nits.issue: Nachbearbeitung tab testid is 'tab-meta' (code), not 'tab-nachbearbeitung' (as named in review request). Functionally the tab exists & works; only a naming/testid inconsistency. Consider renaming to 'tab-nachbearbeitung' for clarity.

verified_flows: Backend pytest 139/144 green via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL (5 pre-existing version asserts failing – unchanged baseline)
Einstieg (/): filter chips are Alle/Operativ/Geplant/Demo only; no 'Abgeschlossen' chip; data-testid='btn-archiv' visible and navigates to /archiv
/archiv: loads with data-testid='archiv-title' = 'Abgeschlossene Einsaetze', 'nur Lesen' badge, archiv-search, archiv-refresh present; empty state archiv-empty rendered when zero archived
Closed demo incident disappears from / and appears in /archiv (POST demo → PATCH status=abgeschlossen)
Archive card: incident-open-<id> (Lesen) visible for all roles; incident-delete-<id> and Reaktivieren visible ONLY for Einsatzleiter; hidden for Helfer and Dokumentar

DeleteArchivModal: Endgültig loeschen button starts disabled; remains disabled on wrong text 'LOESCHEN'; enabled only after exact 'LÖSCHEN' (umlaut) typed; clicking confirm calls DELETE /api/incidents/{id} and card disappears from archive

Lage (/lage) with active incident: Dashboard present with all 8 KPIs (kpi-einsatzdauer, kpi-patienten, kpi-transporte, kpi-konflikte, kpi-abschnitte, kpi-betten-auslastung, kpi-betten-dauer, kpi-ohne-abschnitt) and 4 SectionCards (card-sichtung, card-zeiten, card-transporte, card-ressourcen); 8 module tiles; dashboard-refresh button
Lage for archived incident: 'archiviert · nur Lesen' badge visible; 7/8 module tiles aria-disabled=true with reduced opacity; only /abschluss tile remains enabled and navigable

Sidebar for archived incident: nav-patienten, nav-transport, nav-ressourcen, nav-abschnitte, nav-betten, nav-kommunikation, nav-konflikte → aria-disabled=true ('gesperrt' hint); nav-lage, nav-abschluss, nav-archiv remain enabled; section label switches to 'ARCHIVIERTER INCIDENT'
AbschlussPage for ACTIVE incident: tab-check (default), tab-bericht, tab-versionen visible; Nachbearbeitung tab exists (testid 'tab-meta'); tab-dashboard does NOT exist ✓
AbschlussPage for ARCHIVED incident: only tab-bericht (default) and tab-versionen visible; tab-check and tab-meta (Nachbearbeitung) hidden; version-create-btn (data-testid) is disabled=true ✓
Role switch (Helfer, Dokumentar): /archiv hides delete and Reaktivieren buttons, only Lesen visible
action_items: [OPTIONAL] Rename AbschlussPage Nachbearbeitung tab data-testid from 'tab-meta' to 'tab-nachbearbeitung' to match review-request/naming convention.
[CLEANUP, not urgent] Update 5 pre-existing test_step*_api.py version assertions to expect current '1.0.0' or remove version asserts since backend now uses semantic whole-app version.
critical_code_review_comments: ArchivPage, LagePage, DeleteArchivModal, IncidentCard changes are clean, modular and follow existing els-surface + StatusBadge primitives. Role gating uses existing useRole() hook (can('incident.close') + role==='einsatzleiter'), consistent with rest of app.
LagePage disables module tiles via aria-disabled + opacity-50 rather than conditional rendering – good for accessibility and preserves layout. /abschluss remains reachable for report-only mode.
Sidebar correctly flips section label to 'Archivierter Incident' and sets aria-disabled=true on the 7 operative module links; hot-path UX is protected.

Dashboard component was successfully extracted as self-loading; it appears both in LagePage and reusable. The component is no longer in AbschlussPage (tab-dashboard removed as requested). No duplication of fetch logic observed.

success_rate.backend: 96.5% (139/144; 5 pre-existing version asserts failing – unchanged baseline)

test_credentials: n/a – role picked via localStorage els-role ∈ {einsatzleiter, helfer, dokumentar}
seed_data_creation: All tests used POST /api/incidents/demo and cleaned up via DELETE /api/incidents/{id} at end of each scenario. No persistent test data left behind.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new Archive/Lage/read-only flows are green. Only outstanding item is the 'tab-meta' vs 'tab-nachbearbeitung' testid naming (functional behaviour correct). Backend pytest has 5 pre-existing Meta version-assertion failures that predate this change; flag those as outdated test expectations rather than backend regressions.
